info.title: DataForSEO API
info.description: DataForSEO API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway.

post.description: Setting Google Organic SERP Tasks. Standard task-based endpoint. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call.

version.description: API version

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks in the request

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

group_organic_results.description: Display related results as grouped organic results

calculate_rectangles.description: Calculate pixel rankings for SERP elements in advanced results

postback_url.description: Postback URL for completed task results

pingback_url.description: Pingback URL for task completion notification

get.summary: Get Google Organic HTML Results by id
get.description: Get Google Organic HTML Results by id. Retrieve raw HTML results for a posted task within 30 days at no extra charge.

version.description: API version

post.description: Live Google Organic SERP Regular. Returns regular SERP results immediately. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

version.description: API version

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks returned

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

post.description: Live Google Organic SERP Advanced. Returns advanced SERP results immediately. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

version.description: API version

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks returned

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

calculate_rectangles.description: Calculate pixel rankings for SERP elements

post.summary: Setting Google AI Mode SERP Tasks
post.description: Google AI Mode SERP API provides search results from the AI Mode feature of Google Search. Send JSON task arrays; up to 100 tasks per POST call. Completed tasks can be retrieved later by id, postback_url, or pingback_url.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

keyword.description: Keyword; you can specify up to 700 characters

location_code.description: Search engine location code; required if location_name or location_coordinate is not specified

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location; required if location_code or location_coordinate is not specified

location_coordinate.description: GPS coordinates of a location; required if location_name or location_code is not specified

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language; required if language_code is not specified

language_code.description: Search engine language code; required if language_name is not specified

pingback_url.description: Notification URL of a completed task

postback_data.description: Postback URL datatype; required if postback_url is specified; possible values: advanced, html

get.summary: Get Google AI Mode SERP Advanced Results by id
get.description: Retrieve Google AI Mode SERP advanced results by task id. Results can be requested within 30 days after task creation at no extra charge beyond posting the task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

tasks[].data.description: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request

tasks[].result[].keyword.description: Keyword received in the POST array

tasks[].result[].type.description: Search engine type in the POST array

tasks[].result[].item_types.description: Types of search results found in SERP

tasks[].result[].se_results_count.description: Total number of results in SERP

tasks[].result[].items_count.description: Number of results returned in the items array

tasks[].result[].items.description: Elements of search results found in SERP

tasks[].result[].items[].type.description: Type of element, such as ai_overview

tasks[].result[].items[].markdown.description: Content of the element in markdown format

post.description: Returns Google AI Mode SERP results in real time. Each Live SERP call can contain only one task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result[].keyword.description: Keyword received in the POST array

tasks[].result[].type.description: Search engine type in the POST array

tasks[].result[].se_domain.description: Search engine domain in the POST array

tasks[].result[].location_code.description: Location code in the POST array

tasks[].result[].language_code.description: Language code in the POST array

tasks[].result[].item_types.description: Types of search results found in SERP

tasks[].result[].items_count.description: Number of results returned in the items array

tasks[].result[].items.description: Elements of search results found in SERP

keyword.description: Keyword; you can specify up to 700 characters

location_code.description: Search engine location code; required if location_name or location_coordinate is not specified

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location; required if location_code or location_coordinate is not specified

location_coordinate.description: GPS coordinates of a location; required if location_name or location_code is not specified

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language; required if language_code is not specified

language_code.description: Search engine language code; required if language_name is not specified

calculate_rectangles.description: Enable pixel ranking calculations for elements in SERP

browser_screen_resolution_ratio.description: Screen resolution ratio for rectangle calculations

get.summary: Get Events SERP Completed Tasks
get.description: Get Events SERP Completed Tasks. Returns a list of completed tasks that have not been collected yet. Up to 1000 tasks completed within the previous 3 days can be returned per call.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result[].id.description: Task identifier of the completed task

tasks[].result[].se.description: Search engine specified when setting the task

tasks[].result[].date_posted.description: Date when the task was posted in UTC format

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.description: URL for collecting SERP Advanced results

post.description: Setting Google Autocomplete Tasks. DataForSEO returns Google Autocomplete suggestions for a keyword, cursor position, and selected client. Your account is charged only for setting a task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

keyword.description: Keyword to get autocomplete suggestions for

client.description: Search client for autocomplete, such as chrome, chrome-omni, gws-wiz, safari, firefox, img, or youtube

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

pingback_url.description: Notification URL of a completed task

last_updated.description: Last time the dataset was updated, such as 1m, 1y, or 3y

usage_rights.description: Usage rights, such as commercial or noncommercial

tasks[].result[].id.description: Task identifier of the completed task
